variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 17428 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 17428 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 17428 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.

variants.title: Donaldson P788895 Air Filter, Primary Obround Powercore | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 17428
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P788895 Air Filter, Primary Obround Powercore is designed to provide reliable performance in air filter, primary obround powercore applications. Built with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality and durability. Ideal for industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty environments, this component enhances system performance and longevity.

variants.title: Fleetguard AF4246 Air Filter | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 17428
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF4246 air filter meets or exceeds the customers’ technical specifications for air filtration systems including factors such as: media fiber size, shape, pore size, thickness, weave and mechanical strength.
